title: Puthu Mazhai (Delulu) Song Lyrics Tamil | Sarvam Maya

sections.intro: Experience the ethereal magic of Puthu Mazhai from the movie Sarvam Maya, a track that has captured hearts with its 'delulu' aesthetic. Composed by Justin Varghese and soulfully rendered by Shakthisree Gopalan, this song is a dreamy journey through love and longing. Dive into the full lyrics below.
sections.easterEgg:
Hidden Details You Missed! 🕵️‍♂️

  • This song became a massive viral hit on Instagram Reels, dubbed as the 'Delulu Song' due to its dreamy, imaginative atmosphere.
  • Shakthisree Gopalan's breathy vocal delivery was intentionally mixed to sound like a whisper, enhancing the internal monologue feel of the song
sections.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What movie is Puthu Mazhai from?

It is from the movie 'Sarvam Maya', starring Nivin Pauly and Riya Shibu.

Who is the music director for Puthu Mazhai?

The music is composed by Justin Varghese, known for his unique melodic arrangements.

stanzas:
Puthu mazhai veelnthatho unnaal
Aruginil amarntha antha iravil
Ithayame oru nilaa nathi

Siragugal mella virithatho
Sirippu mani maalai korthatho
Niraiyutho manam thaane

Vaa povom kaanatha thoorangal
Irandum saayam thodum megamaai
Puthiya paathaiyil sentridalaam
Manjal pookkal niraintha ninaivugalil

Entha vaanam pirinthatho
Veelntha oru thaaragaye
Naan theda vendiyathu yaarai meendum

Paathaigal ariyaathu intrum
Koodu sera oru mogam
Unnai en kannil kandathaal

Thiraiyilum nerukkam oruvan illaye
Intha thurumbilum kurumbu sirippu illaye

Naanum un kaigal korkattumo
Naam inainthu aadidave

Puthu mazhai veelnthathu pole
Siragugal mella virithatho
Sirippu mani maalai korthatho
Niraiyutho manam ennulle
tamilStanzas:
புது மழை வீழ்ந்ததோ உன்னால்
அருகினில் அமர்ந்த அந்த இரவில்
இதயமே ஒரு நிலா நதி

சிறகுகள் மெல்ல விரித்ததோ
சிரிப்பு மணி மாலை கோர்த்ததோ
நிறையுதோ மனம் தானே

வா போவோம் காணாத தூரங்கள்
இரண்டும் சாயம் தொடும் மேகமாய்
புதிய பாதையில் சென்றிடலாம்
மஞ்சள் பூக்கள் நிறைந்த நினைவுகளில்

எந்த வானம் பிரிந்ததோ
வீழ்ந்த ஒரு தாரகையே
நான் தேட வேண்டியது யாரை மீண்டும்

பாதைகள் அறியாது இன்றும்
கூடு சேர ஒரு மோகம்
உன்னை என் கண்ணில் கண்டதால்

திரையிலும் நெருக்கம் ஒருவன் இல்லையே
இந்தத் துரும்பிலும் குறும்பு சிரிப்பு இல்லையே

நானும் உன் கைகள் கோர்க்கட்டுமோ
நாம் இணைந்து ஆடிடவே

புது மழை வீழ்ந்தது போலே
சிறகுகள் மெல்ல விரித்ததோ
சிரிப்பு மணி மாலை கோர்த்ததோ
நிறையுதோ மனம் என்னுள்ளே
englishStanzas:
Puthu mazhai veelnthatho unnaal Aruginil amarntha antha iravil Ithayame oru nilaa nathi

[Did a fresh rain fall because of you? On that night when you sat beside me, my heart became a river of moonlight.]

Siragugal mella virithatho Sirippu mani maalai korthatho Niraiyutho manam thaane

[Did wings slowly spread open? Was a garland of smiles woven? My heart fills up on its own.]

Vaa povom kaanatha thoorangal Irandum saayam thodum megamaai Puthiya paathaiyil sentridalaam

[Come, let's go to unseen distances; like clouds where colors blend, let us travel on new paths.]

Entha vaanam pirinthatho Veelntha oru thaaragaye Naan theda vendiyathu yaarai meendum

[Which sky was separated? Oh fallen star, who is it that I must search for again?]

Paathaigal ariyaathu intrum Koodu sera oru mogam Unnai en kannil kandathaal

[Even today, without knowing the paths, there is a longing to return to the nest because I saw you in my eyes.]

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Puthu Mazhai?

Puthu Mazhai conveys themes of love and nostalgia, reflecting on cherished memories and emotions associated with a romantic relationship.

What is the context of this song in the movie Sarvam Maya?

The song is likely featured during a pivotal romantic moment in Sarvam Maya, enhancing the emotional depth of the storyline.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Shakthisree Gopalan and composed by Justin Varghese.

When was Puthu Mazhai released?

Puthu Mazhai was released on February 7, 2026.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Puthu Mazhai, the listener is taken on a melodic journey that beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and reminiscence. The song's lyrics evoke a sense of longing and connection, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. As the protagonist reflects on cherished moments, the soothing composition enhances the emotional experience. This track is sure to resonate with anyone who appreciates heartfelt melodies.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Puthu Mazhai from Sarvam Maya is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With Shakthisree Gopalan's enchanting vocals and Justin Varghese's soulful composition, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced love. Dive into a world of emotions as the lyrics paint a beautiful picture of longing and connection.
stanzaMeanings: The new rain has fallen, and in the night where you are close, my heart is like a moonlit river.
Wings are slowly spreading, laughter is like a garland, and the heart is full.
Let's go, without seeing the boundaries, both of us can start a new path filled with yellow flowers and memories.
Which sky has separated? I need to find that star again, who should I search for?
Unseen paths are now a sweet burden, seeing you in my eyes.
There is no one in the screen, and there is no laughter in this mess.
Can I hold your hands? Let's dance together.
Like the new rain that has fallen, wings are slowly spreading, laughter is like a garland, and my heart is full.
